    Description

    Sets the default background color
    FxStyleBuilder

    Sets the background color when disabled

    Sets the background color when focused
    FxStyleBuilder

    Sets the background color on hover

    Sets the default border color

    Sets the border color when in an error state

    Sets the border color when focused
    FxStyleBuilder

    Sets the border color on hover

    Sets the border and background radius in pixels
    FxStyleBuilder
    FxStyleBuilder.borderWidth(double px)
    Sets the border width in pixels
    FxStyleBuilder
    FxStyleBuilder.color(String value)
    Sets the default text color.
    FxStyleBuilder
    FxStyleBuilder.colorDisabled(String value)
    Sets the color when disabled
    FxStyleBuilder
    FxStyleBuilder.colorError(String value)
    Sets the text color when in an error state
    FxStyleBuilder
    FxStyleBuilder.colorFocus(String value)
    Sets the text color when focused
    FxStyleBuilder
    FxStyleBuilder.colorHover(String value)
    Sets the text color on hover.
    FxStyleBuilder
    FxStyleBuilder.fontSize(double px)
    Sets the font size in pixels
    FxStyleBuilder
    FxStyleBuilder.fontWeight(String weight)
    Sets the font weight
    static FxStyleBuilder
    FxStyle.of()
    Returns a new FxStyleBuilder for constructing an FxStyle.
    FxStyleBuilder
    FxStyleBuilder.padding(double px)
    Sets uniform padding on all sizes
    FxStyleBuilder
    FxStyleBuilder.padding(double vertical, double horizontal)
    Sets vertical and horizontal padding independently
